summary: Add an opt-in browser pointer driven by the strict index-finger pose and click by opening the same hand after a stable hover.
scope: Map mirrored indexTip coordinates directly to the MacBook main display in Chrome, Safari, Edge and Quark.
Require 150ms pointing activation, tolerate 180ms classifier dropouts and reject single-frame jumps above 18 percent of the screen diagonal.
Arm click after a 350ms stable hover, then consume an open-palm transition within 800ms as one frozen-position click.
Show a yellow index-tip marker in the screen overlay and MediaPipe calibration preview while test mode is active.
validation: swift test passed 28 tests including pointer activation, stability, click transition, rejection, dropout tolerance, jump protection and pinch priority
TypeScript typecheck and 32 Web regression tests passed
Release app build, strict codesign and installed 0.8.0 build 14 checks passed
Installed UI confirmed pointer test defaults off, permissions remain allowed and MediaPipe GPU reached 25 FPS at 16.0ms
notes: Pointer test mode defaults to off and persists the user choice.
No DOM access or screen recording permission is used; real YouTube hover behavior remains a physical-hand acceptance test.
